$:/plugins/kookma/kara/history.text:
Full change log  https://kookma.github.io/TW-Kara/#ChangeLog

* ''0.7.3'' -- 2022.09.27 -- New search filter, bug fixes
* ''0.6.4'' -- 2022.08.05 -- New features, update to TW 5.2.3
* ''0.5.1'' -- 2022.07.28 -- Documentation improvement and bug fixes
* ''0.5.0'' -- 2022.07.28 -- First public release
* ''0.1.0'' -- 2022.07.26 -- Conceptualization, beta release

$:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/add-items.text:
\define tempTid()$:/temp/kara/add-item/$(tempId)$ \define kara-input-item() <$keyboard actions=<>key=escape> <$keyboard actions=<>key=enter> <$edit-text tiddler=<>tag=input class=kk-kara-input-textbox placeholder=<>default=""focus=<>minHeight=1em/> \end \define kara-cancel-action()<$action-deletetiddler $tiddler=<>/> \define kara-add-items()
<>
<$button actions=<>disabled={{{[get[text]!is[blank]then[no]else[yes]]}}}class=tc-btn-invisible>{{$:/core/images/new-button}}
\end

$:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/checklist.text:
\define checklist(tiddler showInput focus:yes mode)
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/definitions
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/add-items
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/add-items-checklist
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/disp-items-checklist
<$let tiddler={{{[<__tiddler__>trim[]]}}}src={{{[<tiddler>!is[blank]then<tiddler>else{!!title}]}}}dataBlockStartDelimiter=@@.todo dataBlockEndDelimiter=@@ doneMark=[x] undoneMark="[ ]"undoneMarkalt=[] tempId={{{[<tiddler>!is[blank]then[checklist/$(currentTiddler)$/]addsuffix<tiddler>]:else[[checklist/]addsuffix[$(currentTiddler)$]]}}}editTextPlaceholder="add new todo item"focusStatus=<<__focus__>>displayMode={{{[<checklistDisplayConfig>get[text]][<__mode__>]:and[nth[]]}}}lbr="
">
<!---->
<$let dblock0={{{[<src>get[text]splitregexp<dataBlockStartDelimiter>butfirst[1]]}}}dblock={{{[<dblock0>splitregexp<dataBlockEndDelimiter>butlast[1]]}}}>
<section class=kk-kara-ui>

<$list filter="[<__showInput__>!match[no]]"variable=null>
<<kara-add-items>>
</$list>

<<kara-disp-items>>
</section>
</$let>

\end

$:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/disp-items.text:
\define toggle-action(param) <$vars in={{{[addsuffix]}}}out={{{[trim[]addprefix[ ]addprefix<__param__>addsuffix]}}}> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>text={{{[get[text]search-replace:g:,]}}}/> \end \define disp-single-item() <$list filter="[trim[]removeprefix][trim[]removeprefix]+[nth[]]"variable=entry> <$button actions="<>"class=tc-btn-invisible> <$transclude tiddler=<>field=title/> <$list filter="[trim[]removeprefix]"variable=entry> <$button actions="""<>"""class=tc-btn-invisible> <$transclude tiddler=<>field=title/> \end \define delete-single-item() <$button class=tc-btn-invisible>{{$:/plugins/kookma/kara/images/times}} <$let in={{{[addsuffix]}}}out=""}}}> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>text={{{[get[text]search-replace:g:,]}}}/> \end \define kara-disp-items() <$let defaultDispFilter="[splitregexp[\n]!is[blank]]"sortedDispFilter="[splitregexp[\n]!is[blank]trim:prefix[]sort[]]"dispFilter={{{[match[sort]thenelse]}}}>
    <$list filter=<>variable=row>
  • <>
    <>
    • \end

\define kara-disp-items()
<div class=interstitial style=display:block;>
<$list filter='[<displayMode>match[reverse]]'emptyMessage='<$transclude tiddler=<<dblock>>field=title mode=block/>'>
<$transclude tiddler={{{[<dblock>splitregexp[\n]!is[blank]trim:prefix[]trim[*]trim:prefix[]!sort[]addprefix[* ]join<lbr>]}}}field=title mode=block/>
</$list>

\end

$:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/interstiti.text:
\define interstitial(tiddler showInput focus:yes mode)
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/definitions
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/add-items
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/add-items-interstitial
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/disp-items-interstitial
<$let tiddler={{{[<__tiddler__>trim[]]}}}src={{{[<tiddler>!is[blank]then<tiddler>else{!!title}]}}}dataBlockStartDelimiter=@@.interstitial dataBlockEndDelimiter=@@ tempId={{{[<tiddler>!is[blank]then[interstitial/$(currentTiddler)$/]addsuffix<tiddler>]:else[[interstitial/]addsuffix[$(currentTiddler)$]]}}}editTextPlaceholder="add new interstitial note"focusStatus=<<__focus__>>displayMode={{{[<interstitialDisplayConfig>get[text]][<__mode__>]:and[nth[]]}}}lbr="
">
<!---->
<$let dblock0={{{[<src>get[text]splitregexp<dataBlockStartDelimiter>butfirst[1]]}}}dblock={{{[<dblock0>splitregexp<dataBlockEndDelimiter>butlast[1]]}}}>
<section class=kk-kara-ui>

<$list filter="[<__showInput__>!match[no]]"variable=null>
<<kara-add-items>>
</$list>

<<kara-disp-items>>
</section>
</$let>

\end

$:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/list-all-i.text:

\end

$:/plugins/kookma/kara/readme.text:
; Kara
Kara is a small in tiddler plain checklist and interstitial journaling. It has a minimal UI and lets you manually add/remove items/notes to your checklist/interstitial journal. Items can be simply searched using standard search. Kara does not use any system or third party tiddlers.

;Code and demo
For learning plugin features, syntax, tutorial and examples see the plugin demo and code pages

* Demo: https://kookma.github.io/TW-Kara/
* Code: https://github.com/kookma/TW-Kara

$:/plugins/kookma/kara/styles/details.text: details.kk-kara-dt>summary{list-style:none;padding-left:5px}details.kk-kara-dt summary{cursor:pointer;font-weight:300}details.kk-kara-dt>summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}details.kk-kara-dt{user-select:none}details.kk-kara-dt[open] summary svg{transform:rotate(+90deg)}details.kk-kara-dt summary svg{transition:all .3s;width:1.2em;height:1.2em;vertical-align:baseline;float:right}details.kk-kara-dt:focus{outline:0}details.kk-kara-dt summary svg{opacity:0;transition:opacity .6s ease-in}details.kk-kara-dt:hover summary svg{opacity:1}

$:/plugins/kookma/kara/ui/ControlPanel/S.caption: Kara
$:/plugins/kookma/kara/ui/ControlPanel/S.text:
\import $:/plugins/kookma/kara/macros/definitions
These settings let you customise the behaviour of Kara plugin.

---

;Show Kara setting in more sidebar
:<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/kara/ui/ControlPanel/Settings" tag="$:/tags/MoreSideBar"> Show setting in "More" sidebar</$checkbox>

;Options
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<interstitialDisplayConfig>> field="text" checked="reverse"> Interstitial notes in reverse chronological order</$checkbox>
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<checklistDisplayConfig>>    field="text" checked="sort"> Sort checklist items, display completed at the bottom</$checkbox>
